title: Intellectual Property Policy
content: Defines ownership, disclosure, protection, licensing, and commercialization of intellectual property — including inventions, patents, copyrights, trademarks, and tangible research property — created by Morgan State University faculty, staff, and students in the course of university-supported activities or sponsored research. Approved by the Board of Regents; compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
